name: games played
expected_query: with "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid") select "player"."pid", "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."rate_type_total_count" AS "games_played_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" on "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."rate_type_total_count", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
